title: Carnegie Mellon College of Fine Arts
body: The College of Fine Arts (CFA) is the school of the arts at Carnegie Mellon University, a private university in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. It administers five department-level schools: the School of Architecture, the School of Art, the School of Design, the School of Drama, and the School of Music.
